name: Onyx Gold Corp.
description: Onyx Gold Corp. is a Canadian junior gold explorer with 100% ownership of properties in the Timmins Gold Camp in Ontario and the Selwyn Basin region of Yukon Territory. The company is advancing a fully funded 50,000-metre drill program at the high-grade Munro-Croesus property in Timmins, one of Canada's most historically significant gold-silver properties.
